data.title: Carbon Robotics & NVIDIA - From Farm to Fork: How AI Is Transforming Food Safety
data.description: Discover how artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing agriculture by reducing the need for pesticides in the food supply chain within the United States. In Seattle, on April 29, 2026, it was reported that a significant portion of fresh fruits and vegetables in the U.S. carry residues of pesticides. Through the application of AI technology, farms are now able to minimize pesticide usage, creating a safer and healthier produce. This innovation is transforming the farming industry and ensuring the delivery of pesticide-free food products to consumers.

data.title: MoonPay enters institutional sector, buys Sodot key management firm. Regulator leads expansion. #crypto #finance
data.description: MoonPay, a leading crypto payments processor, is broadening its services to cater to institutional clients. The company, which has processed over $500 million in transactions, has appointed a seasoned regulator to oversee this new venture.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING NuCube Energy and Idaho State University Selected for U.S. Department of Energy Nuclear Energy Launch Pad USA
data.description: NuCube Energy and Idaho State University have been chosen by the Department of Energy for the Nuclear Energy Launch Pad USA program. This initiative will involve the deployment of the ART microreactor at Idaho State University's Pocatello campus. This collaboration aims to advance clean energy technology, with a focus on nuclear power. The selection of NuCube Energy and Idaho State University for this program highlights their expertise in the field and their commitment to innovation.

data.title: BARKER WELLNESS LAUNCHES MUSHROOM ADAPTOGEN GUMMIES AT TARGET NATIONWIDE
data.description: Target is broadening its wellness product range by adding Barker Wellness' vegan mushroom adaptogen gummies. This move aims to introduce functional wellness solutions to a wider customer base. The expansion was announced on April 29, 2026, in Los Angeles. Barker Wellness, created by a renowned wellness advocate, legendary drummer, and record producer, will offer its innovative gummies at Target stores, increasing access to these products for consumers.

data.title: IP House and Digital Citizens Alliance Expose How Global Piracy Networks Operate as Organized Crime Syndicates
data.description: A recent study titled "Organized Piracy Crime" sheds light on the transformation of digital piracy into a complex global criminal network. Released by IP House and the Digital Citizens Alliance, the research uncovers the increasing confluence of illicit activities across borders. The report, unveiled in Washington on April 29, 2026, highlights the evolution of piracy into a sophisticated ecosystem.

data.title: $100M acquisition: MoonPay buys Sodot for institutional crypto expansion, forming new unit led by ex-CFTC Chair Pham.
data.description: MoonPay has recently finalized its acquisition of Sodot, a crypto security infrastructure provider based in Israel. This strategic move is set to pave the way for MoonPay's establishment of a new institutional division, which will be overseen by Caroline Pham, the former Acting Chair of CFTC. With this development, MoonPay aims to bolster its capabilities in serving institutional clients.

data.title: A New Culinary Icon Rises Above Pensacola: Michelin-Starred Chef Akira Back to Debut Namesake, Akira Back Rooftop Restaurant at Reverb by Hard Rock
data.description: Renowned chef Akira Back, who holds Michelin stars, is scheduled to launch his new restaurant, Namesake, at Reverb by Hard Rock Pensacola in 2029.

data.title: Prediction market volume soars to $25.7B monthly with increase in user engagement beyond one-time events.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Bitget Wallet and Polymarket revealed that retail users are increasingly involved in prediction markets, with a focus on sustained engagement rather than one-time wagers. This trend highlights a shift towards ongoing participation, indicating a growing interest in the market.

data.title: Peraton Achieves CMMC Final Level 2, Reinforcing Commitment to Secure, Uninterrupted Mission Support
data.description: Peraton, based in Reston, Virginia, has attained Final Level 2 certification under the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) program. This accomplishment follows a positive evaluation by a CMMC Certified Third-Party Assessment Organization. The certification highlights Peraton's dedication to providing top-tier cybersecurity practices for its clients. The CMMC program, created by the Department of War (DoW), sets demanding cybersecurity criteria for safeguarding sensitive data. This achievement signifies Peraton's commitment to ensuring cybersecurity excellence.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Zimmer Biomet Following Q1 Results
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ZBH) announced strong first-quarter earnings as of Tuesday. The company's adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.09 per share, marking a 15.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the Street's forecast of $1.86 per share. Sales for the period reached $2.087 billion, indicating a 9.3% rise on a reported basis, a 6.8% increase on a constant currency basis, and a 2.9% uptick on an organic constant currency basis, exceeding expectations of $2.07 billion in sales. Zimmer Biomet's Chairman, President, and CEO, Ivan Tornos, stated, "We are off to a solid start to the year — strategically, operationally, and financially." The company also adjusted its fiscal earnings guidance from the initial range of $8.30-$8.45 per share to $8.40-$8.55 per share, compared to the consensus of $8.40 per share.
